security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Orchestrate autonomous coding agents across local repos.
bundle.longDescription: Claude Orchestrator coordinates Claude Code, Gemini, and Codex CLIs to autonomously work through tasks across multiple local git repositories, with a roadmap loop, verification, usage tracking, and a timeline.
